name: Crealogix Holding AG
summary: Crealogix Holding AG, together with its subsidiaries, develops and sells banking software solutions in Switzerland, rest of Europe, and internationally. It offers CREALOGIX Digital Banking Hub, a platform that enables companies to develop their own digital banking strategies; and public APIs for banking product portfolio. The company also provides CREALOGIX Public APIs for securely connecting to third-party providers according to PSD2; CREALOGIX Branch in a Mobile, a mobile banking solution for retail banking; CREALOGIX Banking Portal, a solution for corporate and private banking; CREALOGIX User Experience Platform, a financial services platform; CREALOGIX financial advisory software solutions to enhance advisory process in various banking sectors; and CREALOGIX Invest, a wealth management end-client user platform for wealth and investment management, including trading valuation and client reporting. It serves retail and corporate banks, as well as the wealth management sector. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Zurich, Switzerland.
